headline: Masco Stock Climbs 19% in 3 Months: Will the Rally Continue?
summary: MAS stock's 19% rise in three months is backed by Q1 beats, a higher sales outlook, margin gains and discounted valuation. Yet inflation and tariffs pose risks.
